---
name: Taxonomy Node Proposal
about: Propose a new Field, Subject, Category, Topic, or Concept for the Master Knowledge Tree
title: '[TAXONOMY] Add/Modify: '
labels: 'taxonomy-proposal'
assignees: ''
---

## Proposed Node Details

- **Taxonomy Level**: [Field / Subject / Category / Topic / Concept]
- **Code (`UPPER_SNAKE_CASE`)**: `PROPOSED_CODE`
- **Name**: Proposed Human-Readable Name
- **Parent Code(s)**: `PARENT_CODE_1, PARENT_CODE_2`
- **Description**: 1-2 sentence neutral description of the knowledge node.
- **Keywords**: `keyword1, keyword2, keyword3`

---

## Pedagogical & Neutrality Justification

- **Technology Neutrality (Marr's Test)**: Verify that the proposal is 100% technology-agnostic (if above SIO level).
- **Why is this node needed?**: Briefly describe which syllabi or learning objectives require this node.
- **Existing Alternatives Checked**: Did you search `general-context/mlo-knowlege-tree.tsv` to confirm no duplicate node exists? [Yes / No]
